preconditions: Navigate to the exact URL http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Verify the application loads home_page in guest state.
Verify the user is unauthenticated before each independent test branch.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and interactive after navigation from home_page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Observe the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: The Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify password input remains masked while typing credentials
steps: Navigate from home_page guest state to the Login page using the person/profile button.
Click inside the Password field.
Type the password value Carwash#1.
Observe the displayed characters during entry.
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks the entered password characters during input and the raw password value is not visibly displayed.

testCases.title: Verify successful authentication using approved credentials returns the user to authenticated home_page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home and verify guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Enter krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The user is authenticated successfully, the application returns to home_page in authenticated state, authenticated user identity is displayed, and authenticated-only UI features become visible.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username and invalid password display only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter invaliduser into the Username field.
Enter InvalidPassword1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message is shown, and the application remains unauthenticated on the Login page or equivalent unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify blank Username and blank Password submission displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Leave the Username field empty.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no separate required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify submission with only Username populated displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin into the Username field.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed without dedicated required-field validation messaging, and the application remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify submission with only Password populated displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Leave the Username field empty.
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed without dedicated required-field validation messaging, and the application remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify incorrect password for approved username does not authenticate the user
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter Carwash#999 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is displayed, authenticated user identity is not shown, and the application remains in unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify leading whitespace in Username credential is observationally validated
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter a Username value with leading whitespace before krisadmin.
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application behavior for leading whitespace in credentials is consistently observable, and if authentication fails the user remains unauthenticated with only the generic Failed message displayed.

testCases.title: Verify trailing whitespace in Password credential is observationally validated
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 followed by trailing whitespace into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application behavior for trailing whitespace in credentials is consistently observable, and failed authentication does not transition the application into authenticated state while displaying only the generic Failed message.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only credential values do not authenticate the user
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter only whitespace characters into the Username field.
Enter only whitespace characters into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no separate required-field validation appears, and the application remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns the user to home_page without authentication
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Verify the Back button is visible and enabled.
Click the Back button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to home_page in unauthenticated guest state and authenticated-only UI is not visible.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns the user to home_page without authentication
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Verify the Home button is visible and enabled.
Click the Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to home_page in unauthenticated guest state and authenticated-only features are not displayed.

testCases.title: Verify failed authentication does not expose authenticated user identity or authenticated-only features
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter invalid credentials into the Username and Password fields.
Click the Login button.
Observe the application state after the failed authentication attempt.
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains unauthenticated, authenticated user identity is not displayed, authenticated-only features remain inaccessible, and only the generic Failed message is shown.

testCases.title: Verify Login button processes pasted approved credentials successfully
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Paste krisadmin into the Username field.
Paste Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The pasted approved credentials authenticate successfully and the application returns to authenticated home_page with authenticated user identity and authenticated-only UI visible.
